name: Rocky-Road Cheesecake Cups
recipeIngredient: 1 package (8 oz.) cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the wafer crumbs, melted butter, and 1 tablespoon sugar. Press onto the bottoms and sides of 14 (2-1/2-to 3-inch) muffin cups or 6-ounce custard cups. Refrigerate while preparing the filling.
2. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
3. In a medium bowl, beat the cream cheese until softened. Blend in 1/3 cup sugar, cocoa powder, eggs, sour cream, and vanilla extract. Stir in marshmallows and almonds.
4. Spoon the mixture into the crumb-lined cups.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 to 22 minutes or until set.
6. Remove from the oven; cool.
7. Run a small spatula around the edge of each cheesecake to remove. Makes 14 individual cheesecakes.
